subject: [PATCH v7 00/10] dax/kmem: atomic whole-device hotplug via sysfs

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Addressed all issues raised by Sashiko reviews, confirming that the series is clean as-is.

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch series introduces atomic whole-device hotplug via sysfs for the dax/kmem driver, allowing for a single operation to offline and remove an entire multi-block DAX kmem device without creating a race condition between userland controllers. The series includes refactoring of existing code, addition of new helper functions, and implementation of the sysfs interface for atomic whole-device hotplug.
